# ShopStack

> Operação Completa de Engenharia & Sustentação para E-commerce Shopify de Alta Escala.

This is the developer directory and organizational profile of ShopStack, a premium B2B engineering agency specialized in high-performance Shopify operations, custom application development, and 24/7 uptime monitoring.

## Core Information
- **Domain**: https://shopstack.com.br/
- **Main Stack**: Shopify Plus, Shopify Hydrogen, Oxygen, React, Next.js, Node.js, GraphQL, AWS Serverless.
- **Key Offerings**: 
  - Custom Shopify App Development
  - Platform Migrations (legacy systems to Shopify Plus)
  - Performance Optimization (Core Web Vitals)
  - 24/7 Sustentation & Uptime Monitoring
  - B2B & Atacado Digital operations
  - Omnichannel / Unified Commerce

## Navigation
- [Homepage](https://shopstack.com.br/) - Main landing page, portfolio, case studies, and FAQ.
- [Sobre Nós](https://shopstack.com.br/sobre.html) - Detailed organizational profile, developer seniority, and tech stack details.
- [Contato](https://shopstack.com.br/#diagnostico) - Actionable contact details, WhatsApp channel, and strategic diagnostic request.

## Target Audience & Verticals
1. **D2C & Marcas Proprietárias**: Brands with massive traffic drops, influencers, custom checkouts.
2. **B2B & Atacado Digital**: Businesses requiring dynamic CNPJ pricing, complex billing, ERP sync.
3. **Omnichannel & Redes de Varejo**: Retail chains needing physical/digital stock unification and O2O logistics.
